name: prodavnica
description: Prodavnica monorepo - admin dashboard i customer-facing aplikacija

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); spawnSync('npm run db:generate --workspace=packages/database', { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); process.exit(0);"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=apps/prodavnica-client && npm run build --workspace=apps/prodavnica-admin
scripts.build:vercel: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const run = (cmd) => spawnSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); run('npm run db:generate --workspace=packages/database'); const url = ((process.env.VERCEL_PROJECT_PRODUCTION_URL || '') + (process.env.VERCEL_URL || '')).toLowerCase(); const workspace = url.includes('admin') ? 'apps/prodavnica-admin' : 'apps/prodavnica-client'; const res = run('npm run build --workspace=' + workspace); process.exit(res.status ?? 1);"
scripts.build: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const run = (cmd) => spawnSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); if (process.env.VERCEL === '1') { const res = run('npm run build:vercel'); process.exit(res.status ?? 1); } run('npm run db:generate --workspace=packages/database'); const res = run('npm run build:all'); process.exit(res.status ?? 1);"
